## TDD Workflow

> Задачи организованы по TDD: Red → Green → Refactor. Каждый этап начинается с .feature сценария (Red), затем реализация (Green), затем рефакторинг.

## Phase 0: BDD Foundation (Red)

BDD foundation is already in place (verified in DESIGN.md Evidence: `tests/step_definitions/feature_bdd_only_guard.ts` exists and `@cucumber/cucumber` is installed). The foundation comprises:

- `.specs/bdd-only-migration/bdd-only-migration.feature` — scenarios BDDONLY001_01..04.
- `tests/step_definitions/feature_bdd_only_guard.ts` — step definitions driving the real guard.
- `tests/hooks/before-after.ts` — V4World per-scenario isolation (fresh tempDir).

## Phase 1: Guard hook + scenarios (Green)

## Phase 2: Migration waves (Green)

- [x] build-guard v2 cleanup -- @feature4 — Status: DONE | Est: 45m
  _Requirements: [FR-4](FR.md#fr-4-build-guard-updated-for-v2)_

  _Requirements: [FR-6](FR.md#fr-6-bdd-migrator-upgraded-for-bdd-only-with-no-exceptions)_

- [ ] 56 detector checks → BDD with mutation parity -- @feature2 — Status: TODO | Est: 120m
  _Requirements: [FR-2](FR.md#fr-2-detector-unit-tests-migrated-to-bdd-with-mutation-parity)_

- [ ] .NET 8 + dotnet-stryker in Docker -- @feature3 — Status: TODO | Est: 90m
  _Requirements: [FR-3](FR.md#fr-3-net-mutation-path-runs-in-docker)_

- [ ] migrate all vitest to BDD -- @feature5 — Status: TODO | Est: 480m
  _Requirements: [FR-5](FR.md#fr-5-all-vitest-tests-migrated-to-bdd)_
  **Done When:**
